name: 智研构建部署
description: ZhiYan CI/CD official MCP, supporting TKE container deployment, pipeline execution records, artifact versions, release review orders, deployment history, and more.
description_zh: 智研构建部署官方MCP，操作能力支持TKE容器部署，查询能力包括：流水线执行记录、制品版本、发布评审单、部署历史等。
description_en: ZhiYan CI/CD official MCP, supporting TKE container deployment, pipeline execution records, artifact versions, release review orders, deployment history, and more.
examples_zh: 查看最近的流水线执行记录
查询制品库中最新的制品版本
帮我发起一次TKE容器部署
查看发布评审单的审批状态
查询最近的部署历史记录
examples_en: Query the latest artifact versions in the repository
Check the approval status of release review orders
